# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this change does and why. Include any context a reviewer needs to understand the motivation.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Theme / CSS change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Other (please describe below)

## How tested

Please describe how you verified this change:

- [ ] Ran `./build.sh` (requires python3) and it produced `dist/guacamole-theme-orangelion.jar` without errors.
- [ ] Deployed the extension and confirmed it loads. Look for this log line:

  ```
  Extension "OrangeLion Theme" (orangelion) loaded
  ```

- [ ] Noted any manual steps or environment details reviewers may need to reproduce your testing.

## Screenshots

For any visual change, attach before and after screenshots so reviewers can compare the restyled interface.

- Before:
- After:

## Checklist

- [ ] No em-dash characters anywhere in the changes or description.
- [ ] No references to any unaffiliated organization, trademark, or third-party brand (this project is community-maintained and org-neutral).
- [ ] Screenshots updated if the change affects visuals.
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed.
